![Video Sound](https://www.editionresidencesedgewater.com/wp-content/themes/edition-residences/assets/img/icon-sound.svg)![Video Mute](https://www.editionresidencesedgewater.com/wp-content/themes/edition-residences/assets/img/icon-mute.svg)

One iconic city. One iconic brand. EDITION Residences, Miami Edgewater is a celebration of the ultimate modern Miami lifestyle—one that only EDITION can deliver.



![Aerial view of Edition Residences Edgewater, a modern waterfront glass tower in Miami with skyline and bay in background.](https://cdn.editionresidencesedgewater.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/07104447/EDITIONResidencesMiamiEdgewater_Hero-optimized.webp)

# **The First of Its Kind**

A pure glass prism, boldly situated on 800 linear feet of scenic bayfront, rises above the lush gardens of Miami’s most desirable enclave. Designed by award-winning architect Bernardo Fort-Brescia of Arquitectonica and acclaimed Studio Munge in service of discerning residents and their guests, the Residences are a tranquil respite, encouraging relaxation, inspiration and reflection amidst the vibrant energy of Miami.

![A photo captured through garden flowers, showcasing beautifully designed architectural skyscrapers in miami.](https://cdn.editionresidencesedgewater.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/07105132/ArchDetailShot_PS-scaled-opt.webp)

# Edition Residences Edgewater

### **2029**

55 Stories / 185 Residences of
1, 2, 3 & 4 Bedrooms

**2121 N Bayshore Dr, Miami, FL 33137, USA**

[+1.305.767.7431](tel:13057677431)

Edition Residences is a luxury residential project launched in 2022 in the fabulous area of ​​Edgewater, Miami. Currently the project is in the pre-construction stage and the approval of the county. More information coming soon.

This property currently has no available units for sale or rent. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/editionedgewater/#contactform) for more information.

This property currently has no available units for sale or rent. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/editionedgewater/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Signature Design by Bernardo Fort-Brescia, Principal of Miami-based architecture firm, Arquitectonica
- Interior Design by Studio Munge, led by Alessandro Munge
- Managed and operated by EDITION Hotels
- Over 45,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor amenities
- Direct access to the Miami Baywalk with over 800 linear feet of water frontage connecting to Margaret Pace Park
- Covered Porte-Cochère leading to a grand three-story Lobby with Valet, Security, and Reception Desk
- Library and Social Lounges leading to bayfront garden terraces with private fireside lounges
- Full-service Poolside Lounge and Bar connects seamlessly to the cabana-lined bayfront Pool
- Private Dog Run and Grooming Suite
- Electric vehicle charging stations
- 6 luxury Guest Suites for the use of all residents
- State-of-the-art Fitness Center & Yoga Studio
- Full Spa treatment program serviced by EDITION
- Private Dining Room with panoramic views of the Miami Skyline
- Board Room
- Teen Room featuring Virtual Reality Gaming Technology
- Children’s Room
- Multi-sport Simulator
- On-site Fine Dining Restaurant and Catering Kitchen
- Rooftop Pool and Hot Tub

### Residence Features

- One-, Two-, Three-, and Four-Bedroom Residences from 1,952 to 3,815 square feet
- Semi-private elevators lead to Private Residential Foyer
- Ceiling heights range from 10- to 14-feet
- Up to 12-foot deep terraces with panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, Downtown Miami, Miami Beach, and the Atlantic Ocean
- Floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding glass terrace doors
- Designer kitchens with stone countertops and custom finish options
- Sub-Zero and Wolf stainless panel ready appliances
- 5-burner gas cooktop
- Designer dishwasher
- Designer cabinetry
- Undercounter wine cooler
- Luxury bathrooms featuring double vanity, stone countertops, spacious shower and free-standing tub
- Spacious walk-in closets
- Dedicated laundry rooms featuring full-size, side-by-side washer and dryer
- Pre-wiring for custom window treatments
- Dedicated parking with additional valet option

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/07-Edition-Residences-Edgewater-SEPT-2022-e1678806581371.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Developer-Two-Roads.jpg)

With over 20 years of experience, Two Roads is a firm that focuses on living and professional environments of the United States, mainly New York and Florida. Every member of their team contribute their background in architecture and construction experience. They are experts seeking out global architectural firms such as Gensler, Arquitectonica and WHLC and pairing them with award-winning interior designers like Jean-Louis Deniot and Thom Filicia, to create amazing residential experiences that redefine skylines and deliver enduring returns to homeowners, investors and partners of each project.

Some of their most renowned Miami condos include [Biscayne Beach](https://miamiresidential.com/biscaynebeach) and [Elysee Miami](https://miamiresidential.com/elyseemiami).
